The branch adds trusted reply-phase diagnostics, OTel reply/context duration spans and metrics, QA OTel latency reporting, and matching docs/API baseline updates.

PR surface: Source +232, Tests +720, Docs +16, Generated 0, Other +1. Total +969 across 19 files.

The patch defect is high-confidence from CI: check-lint reports the new reply.phase.completed event is not handled by the exhaustive stability switch.
